sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69232" key="mureye/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠρεψ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n69232.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boil</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prepare unguents</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:322b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">322b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
